intro: Jahdai was a man of Judah listed in the genealogical records of 1 Chronicles 2:47, whose sons — Regem, Jotham, Geshan, Pelet, Ephah, and Shaaph — are named. He appears in the family line of Caleb through a concubine, within the complex genealogical account of Judah's descendants. No further narrative details about Jahdai appear in Scripture; his significance is solely genealogical.
